Located just off I-95 and a few blocks from St. Francis Hospital, Little Italy, and the scenic Cool Spring Park, the location makes everyday living easy while keeping you close to some of the city’s most loved spots. From the front porch, step inside to an open-concept main level that feels bright, modern, and connected. LVP flooring runs throughout, paired with neutral gray paint, tall ceilings, and recessed lighting that keeps the space feeling light and airy. The living room features a gas fireplace with a mantle, flowing seamlessly into a flexible dining area and an updated kitchen with white cabinetry, granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, a range hood, and a detailed backsplash that adds just the right amount of character. A convenient first-floor powder room completes the space. Upstairs, you’ll find three bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with recessed lighting, a walk-in closet (a rare find in the city), and a private ensuite bath with double vanities and a sleek, marble-look stall shower. The additional full bath in the hallway features a tub-shower combination with matching modern finishes, and the remaining bedrooms offer flexibility for guests, work-from-home, or everyday living. Out back, there’s a second porch area perfect for grilling or relaxing, but the real opportunity is the large unfinished addition connected to the home. Already framed and insulated, this space is ready to be finished and could easily become a first-floor bedroom, second living area, office suite, or even multiple rooms, adding significant square footage and value. Being sold as-is, this home blends modern updates with future potential in a location that continues to grow in popularity.

Known for its unique blend of natural beauty, creative culture, and strong sense of community, Arden offers a lifestyle unlike anywhere else—and this home places you right in the heart of it. As you arrive, you’ll appreciate the established, woodland-like setting, where mature ground cover and organic landscaping blend seamlessly into Arden’s signature environment. The lot offers both character and flexibility, giving you the opportunity to shape outdoor spaces to your own vision. French doors from the living room lead to both a side deck and a larger rear deck overlooking the backyard—ideal for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying Arden’s outdoor lifestyle. This is a rare opportunity to own a well-updated home in a truly one-of-a-kind community—combining natural surroundings, artistic character, and the ease of single-level living.

The lower level presents exceptional entertaining space with a wide-open layout, featuring a granite bar, private home theater with tiered seating, fitness studio, and full bathroom. Additional highlights include elevator access to all three levels, a generator, and a four-car rear-entry garage with epoxy flooring and Tesla charging. Perfectly situated across from Greenville Country Club in the highly sought-after Centerville area, this exceptional estate enjoys a premier location near golf, swimming, dining, and racquet sports, with convenient access to many of the area’s most exclusive golf courses and country clubs. Residents will appreciate close proximity to scenic park trails, Winterthur, Longwood Gardens, and an outstanding collection of fine dining and shopping, while Philadelphia International Airport and Center City Philadelphia are approximately 30 minutes away. Combining timeless architecture, exceptional craftsmanship, and a private setting of rare distinction, this is a remarkable offering in one of Delaware’s most coveted locations.

PublicRemarks: RARE rent-to-own opportunity!  Don’t miss your chance to own this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2 full bathroom semi-detached brick home located in the heart of Wilmington’s sought-after Little Italy neighborhood. This home offers a flexible path to homeownership for a buyer who wants to move in now and buy later. The process allows you to secure a home now and focus on securing optimal traditional financing. Get the home now, enjoy it now, and work toward purchase over time. It can be an excellent fit for someone who needs time to improve credit, build savings, strengthen income, or otherwise position themselves for long-term mortgage success. It may also help protect you if home values rise during the option period. Flexible terms may be tailored to the buyer’s situation, including the down payment and monthly payment structure, creating a more realistic and personalized path forward than a one-size-fits-all conventional purchase. For the right buyer, this can be a lower-barrier path into ownership. Instead of renting with no equity you may be able to apply your upfront down payment toward the future purchase. It's great for a financially capable person who needs a little more runway. Step onto the inviting covered front porch and into a bright, sunlit living space featuring luxury vinyl plank flooring, overhead fan and an open, flowing layout that seamlessly connects the living and dining areas, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. Large windows fill the space with natural light, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Just beyond the kitchen, you’ll find a convenient first-floor full bathroom with a stall shower, along with direct access to the fully fenced backyard with alley access, offering both privacy and functionality. Upstairs, the second level features three well-sized bedrooms, each complete with ceiling fans and generous closet space. The updated full bathroom showcases tile finishes and modern fixtures, providing a clean and refreshed feel. The primary bedroom is especially inviting, with multiple windows allowing for abundant natural light. The unfinished basement provides excellent storage space and includes major system upgrades for peace of mind, including a new Lennox gas furnace with smart heating and cooling technology (2024) and a gas hot water heater (2023). Ideally  situated just steps from William “Judy” Johnson Memorial Park and within close proximity to Wilmington’s Riverfront, DelTech, shopping, dining, and major roadways including I-95 and I-295, this home offers both convenience and lifestyle. For buyers who believe in their future trajectory and want to secure a home now rather than wait and hope conditions become easier later, this can be a very compelling opportunity. The arrangement gives clarity and a path toward ownership with stability and clear steps to take. Whether you're looking to transition from renting to owning or seeking a flexible path to homeownership, this rent-to-own opportunity provides a unique chance to secure a well-maintained home with modern updates and long-term potential.

Thoughtful updates add value and peace of mind, including kitchen appliances, sink, and garbage disposal approximately 2 years old, a Lennox natural gas heat system installed in 2020, and a 50-gallon electric Bradford White water heater. Spring Arbor residents enjoy an exceptional lifestyle with outstanding community amenities, including a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, walking paths, and a variety of social and recreational activities. The HOA provides true low-maintenance living by covering grass cutting, mulching, tree pruning, snow removal, and common area maintenance. Even more impressive, the HOA also includes exterior maintenance for the roof, siding, and driveway—a rare and valuable benefit for a detached home. Move-in ready and filled with hard-to-find features, 79 Lattice Lane is a rare opportunity to enjoy spacious living, extensive storage, and a vibrant active adult lifestyle in a premier Middletown location (restaurants, shopping, and entertainment just minutes away). If you have been searching for a home that offers comfort, convenience, and room to spread out, this one is a must-see.

PublicRemarks: If the answer to any of these questions is yes, then you MUST come see this incredible property today!  Can you imagine yourself with no yard work, yet living along the Brandywine River and hiking at all times of year in the Brandywine Creek Park?   Do you picture yourself living in a single family home, with wide open spaces, gleaming floors, incredible stone exterior, yet without the maintenance of a typical historic single family home?  Do you picture yourself living in a home that feels like a big city "loft", yet is more affordable since it's in a small town, and only a few minutes away from the roads that will get you to the big city?   If that sounds like your vibe, and you answered yes to even one of these questions, then– you’ve found your next home this amazing single family historic stone building in the desirable community of Rockland Mills, Rockland Delaware.    After you pass through the secure gate you’ll turn into your private covered parking area.  You have a covered entrance into your home for bringing in your groceries and when you have guests, they can walk from guest parking up the ramp and to your main living level entrance.  From the single car garage you’ll enter the foyer with beautiful brick flooring and an expansive mudroom closet.  The old mill building has historic brick and stone touches not only on the exterior but throughout the interior.  Step up a half level to the bedroom floor, all completely renovated in 2023!  The primary bedroom is spacious with amazing light streaming through and built in shutters to provide privacy.  The updated bathroom includes heated floors, a separate soaking tub, large double sink vanity and marble steam shower.  From here you will also find a walk in closet, ready for you to design your own layout.  The 2nd bedroom has charming original brick walls, two beautiful windows and an en-suite bathroom with tub/shower.   From this level you’ll take the open stairs to the epitome of open concept living.   Divided by a large chimney with gas fireplace on one side and built in bookshelves on the other, are two rooms each between 600-800 sq feet.   Surrounded by nearly floor to ceiling incredible windows and topped by original old mill timbers, the space can be designed for your own style of living.  The spacious kitchen on one side of the room is a chef’s dream.  From the six burner Gaggenau gas cooktop to the miles of granite counters and SubZero refrigerator, whether you cook your own meals or like to entertain with help, you have room in this kitchen!  The kitchen side of the room could include a large dining table plus conversation area around the built in bookcases.  Then move to the fireplace side of the room and you could set up a relaxing living room and TV for cozy winter nights; you could create an office space in the corner, or create a yoga space near the bright windows.   The options are limitless for this incredible room.   Character and size like this are rare.  So often to obtain the charm and beauty of an old stone home, you’ll find small compartmentalized rooms, but not this one!  Your city like loft, with old world charm is beckoning for you to create the layout that works best for you.  And that’s not all!  In 2023, not only were the full bathrooms completely updated, but the two HVAC’s, hot water heater and washer and dryer were all replaced! Located within minutes of everything, from Greenville restaurants and shops, the DuPont Country Club with golf and tennis, Wilmington businesses, hospital, restaurants and the train station, this convenient oasis awaits you.  Make your showing appointment today!

PublicRemarks: Step into Wilmington’s storied past with 703 N West St, a historic apartment building on the National Register of Historic Places since 1979, adjacent to its sister property and representing one of the city’s only surviving pair of 18th-century stone houses with side-hall plans. Constructed around 1760 by the Woodward family as part of their ropemaking enterprise vital to the colonial port’s shipbuilding trade, this three-story, stuccoed stone structure with a brick rear ell retains charming Georgian elements like paneled walls, chair rails, original fireplaces, and a mid-19th-century mantel with Minton tiles. Its L-shaped layout and preserved details, including wide floorboards and central staircase, highlight Quaker influences and early industrial life in Delaware, complete with unverified local lore tying its hearthstone to the Declaration of Independence platform in Philadelphia. This property offers lots of potential for creative redevelopment—whether restoring it as multi-family housing, converting to a single-family residence, or exploring other adaptive uses—while preserving its irreplaceable architectural heritage. Note that it has lost its prior multi-family use over time and would require approval from the zoning board to reinstate apartments or similar configurations. Situated in the heart of Wilmington’s Downtown Development District, this property qualifies for significant incentives to support your vision, including up to 20% rebates on qualified real property investments through Delaware’s Downtown Development Districts Rebate Program. As a National Register-listed site, it’s also eligible for federal historic preservation tax credits (up to 20% for certified rehabilitations) and potential state grants, making it an ideal opportunity for investors or preservation enthusiasts. In rough condition with needs for major renovations, including roof and stucco maintenance, interior updates, and system overhauls, it’s offered as-is, presenting a unique fixer-upper in Quaker Hill surrounded by commercial growth, historic districts, and easy access to downtown. Seize the opportunity to invest in and preserve this architectural gem while benefiting from incentives designed to boost downtown vitality.

PublicRemarks: Discover a rare piece of American history at 701 N West St, a grand 18th-century Georgian-style single-family home listed on the National Register of Historic Places since 1979. Built circa 1745 by Quaker ropemaker Joseph Woodward, this three-story, L-shaped granite structure exemplifies early colonial architecture in Wilmington, serving as one of the city’s only surviving stone houses with a side-hall plan from that era. Originally tied to the family’s ropemaking business supporting the local shipbuilding industry, it features preserved Federal-period details like paneled wainscoting, an open-string staircase, original fireplaces, wide pine floors, and hand-hewn beams, offering a tangible link to Quaker entrepreneurship and Delaware’s maritime heritage. Spanning 3 stories plus an attic, this 6-bedroom, 3-full-bathroom residence provides ample space for restoration into a stunning home or adaptive reuse project, with its symmetrical facade, multi-pane windows, and central hallway layout blending timeless charm with potential modern updates. Located in Wilmington’s Downtown Development District, this property qualifies for significant incentives to support your vision, including up to 20% rebates on qualified real property investments through Delaware’s Downtown Development Districts Rebate Program. As a National Register-listed site, it’s also eligible for federal historic preservation tax credits (up to 20% for certified rehabilitations) and potential state grants, making it an ideal opportunity for investors or preservation enthusiasts. Currently in rough shape and requiring extensive work, the home is being sold as-is, allowing you to unlock its full potential in a vibrant setting near downtown amenities, parks, and transportation. Don’t miss this chance to own and revive a cornerstone of Wilmington’s colonial past.

PublicRemarks: This 4-bedroom stone home in Alapocas has retained all of its original charm and character, providing a fantastic opportunity for the new owner to honor certain features while making updates to meet today’s functionality and style.  Built in 1954, and owned by the same family since then, the spacious floor plan was designed for comfort, sophistication and entertaining.  The covered front entrance has a built-in bench on one side which is typical of many of the homes in this coveted, picturesque neighborhood.  Step inside and you are welcomed into the foyer of this classic Colonial where you will notice the random width, pegged hardwood floors which continue throughout the home.  The large formal living room on the left has handsome millwork including crown molding, chair rail, and a wood-burning fireplace is the focal point with elegant dentil molding.  From here you can access the enclosed screened porch; a lovely seasonal extension of your living or entertaining space!  The dining room is on the other side of the entryway and it has a beautiful built-in corner cabinet to store and display your favorite pieces.  The kitchen is a step back in time with the original cabinets, a cast iron sink with drainboard, and a vintage oven!!  But the best part is right around the corner…an adorable breakfast booth with a great retro vibe is the perfect spot to enjoy your morning coffee!  A powder room and a wood-paneled den complete this level.  Upstairs, there are four bedrooms; the largest of which is the Primary Bedroom with an en-suite bathroom.  The other three bedrooms share a full bathroom conveniently located at the top of the stairs.  The attic can be accessed via pull-down stairs, and is surprisingly large.  A turned garage supports your parking and storage needs, and is positioned in such a way so that you can navigate coming and going from the driveway with ease.  An entrance to the kitchen from the back side of the house here is functional and convenient.  There is also a stone patio and lots of yard to enjoy!  Now is the perfect time to purchase a home in Alapocas that you can make completely your own!  Located on a quiet street just a few blocks from Wilmington Friends School, and within walking distance to trails, this home is waiting for a Buyer who is ready and willing to take on renovations. The living room flows seamlessly into the dining area, which connects to the eat-in kitchen—perfect for everyday meals and easy entertaining. Descend half a flight from the main level to the cozy family room, also featuring a large front window and plenty of space to relax. Tucked thoughtfully off this level is a private bedroom and a convenient half bathroom, ideal for guests or a home office. From the family room, access the back patio and expansive yard, complete with two peaceful ponds and ample room for gardening, play, or outdoor gatherings. Heading up another half flight of stairs from the living room, you’ll find three generous bedrooms and a full hall bathroom, offering comfortable accommodations for everyone. The finished basement is accessible from the family room and provides even more living space—perfect for a rec room, gym, or hobby area—along with a dedicated laundry room. This well-designed split-level offers great flow, abundant natural light, and a beautiful yard setting, all in a desirable Sherwood Park location. A wonderful place to call home! PublicRemarks: BACK ON THE MARKET THROUGH NO FAULT OF THE SELLERS AND AT A NEW LOW PRICE - SHOWINGS RESTART 4/12. MOTIVATED SELLERS! BRING YOUR OFFERS! Nestled in the Brighton subdivision, this exquisite Colonial-style residence, built by Toll Brothers in 2023 on a corner lot, embodies the pinnacle of modern luxury living. Spanning approximately 2,650 square feet, this detached home offers a harmonious blend of elegance and functionality, perfect for those who appreciate high-end finishes and thoughtful design. Step inside the front door from the covered porch to discover an open floor plan that seamlessly integrates living spaces, accentuated by luxury vinyl plank flooring and strategically placed recessed lighting that enhances the ambiance of the 9' ceilings. The heart of the home is the gourmet kitchen, featuring granite countertops and a spacious island that invites culinary creativity. Equipped with top-of-the-line appliances, including a smart refrigerator, smart double oven, built-in microwave, and sleek induction cooktop, this kitchen is a chef's dream. The adjoining flex space serves perfectly as a dining area providing an ideal setting for entertaining naturally extending between the kitchen, dining, and great room areas. The large pantry ensures ample storage for all your culinary essentials coupled with a second closet space off the kitchen which can feature as an additional pantry or kitchen appliance storage to keep those granite countertops clear of clutter!  The great room is a natural gathering space lit by abundant natural light. The far wall features sound absorbing slated Sonolok by Artika paneling making movie night an experience! Around the corner on the main level the home office is easily accessible without feeling overly pronounced striking the perfect balance for those who want to separate work in the office from living in the home. The main level powder room includes the PEX plumbing ran to convert to a full bath should you wish to do so in the future.  Upstairs the primary suite ties together the same luxury vinyl plank from the main level. The suite includes a generous walk-in closet with extensive built-in shelving offering a dream wardrobe organization system. The en-suite tile floored bathroom is a haven showcasing a walk-in shower compatible with voice control through Anthem by Kohler and enriched by green porcelain tile and gold colored fixtures that promises relaxation and rejuvenation. A designated electrical outlet provides the opportunity for smart toilet or electronic bidet options should the future owners wish to continue adding to the modern oasis. Three additional spacious bedrooms adorn the upper level each featuring soft carpet flooring and ceiling fans. These bedrooms are complemented by a stylish full bathroom. The upper-floor laundry room adds a touch of practicality, making everyday chores a breeze and easily keeping laundry out of view when entertaining.  Security is paramount, with a Ring camera as well as an advanced Reolink system of exterior cameras ensuring peace of mind. Outside, the fenced-in corner lot enhances privacy and curb appeal, while the rear-entry detached two car garage continues to elevate with an electric vehicle charger and additional storage space. Additionally, the asphalt driveway accommodates multiple vehicles. A charming small greenhouse easily accessed from the basement walkout adds a unique touch, perfect for gardening enthusiasts. When finished gardening, the gorgeous backyard patio provides space to relax and unwind enjoying fresh air. In addition to the walkout stairs the basement includes storage shelving, an active radon mitigation system, and rough-in plumbing.  This property is not just a home; it's a lifestyle featuring intentional upgrades and boundless potential. Experience the luxury of modern living where every detail has been meticulously crafted for comfort, style and functionality -and all in the renowned Appoquinimink School District.

PublicRemarks: Experience exceptional scale, privacy, and craftsmanship in this impressive 7-bedroom, 7-bath, 7,000-square-foot luxury Toll Brothers residence situated on a quiet cul-de-sac in the prestigious Highpointe community—known for its resort-style amenities including a clubhouse, pool, walking paths, and playground. A grand double staircase welcomes you into an elegant foyer, setting the stage for the home’s architectural presence and refined interior flow. Expansive living and entertaining spaces are flooded with natural light and meticulously designed to balance comfort and sophistication.  At the heart of the main level, the gourmet kitchen features premium appliances, extensive counter space, and seamless connectivity to the home’s gathering areas. A dedicated butler’s pantry between the kitchen and dining room enhances both everyday functionality and formal entertaining, offering ideal space for staging, storage, and service.  Multiple living areas—including a formal dining room and inviting family room—provide flexible environments for hosting and relaxation.  In the winter months, cozy up to the gas fireplace in the living room, or enjoy the deck and patio outside on warmer days.  A key highlight is the private in-law suite, complete with its own living space, bedroom, and full bath, offering privacy and independence for extended family or guests.  Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite features its own outdoor balcony, and a spacious 4 piece bath with jetted tub and separate shower.  3 closets offer plenty of storage.  The primary suite anchors a collection of generously sized bedrooms, 2 having their own full bath, 2 sharing Jack and Jill Style.  The expansive walkout basement provides additional versatility for recreation, fitness, or future customization.  Situated on a beautifully maintained homesite with strong curb appeal, the property also includes a three-car turned garage for added convenience.  Ideally located minutes from major commuter routes, shopping, and historic New Castle, this Highpointe estate offers a rare combination of luxury, functionality, and community lifestyle—perfect for the discerning buyer seeking an elevated living experience.

Fall 2026 DELIVERY! Construction is underway at Lot 1-B Quail Crossing Drive, a new home crafted by Cornerstone Quality Builders, located just off Route 52 near Buckley’s Tavern in Centreville, DE.  Situated on a beautiful 2-acre homesite, this property offers the opportunity to personalize finishes while construction is in progress. The open floor plan is designed for everyday living and entertaining, featuring a gourmet kitchen with Goebel Cabinetry, a walk-in pantry, and GE Monogram stainless steel appliance package, including a French door double oven, 5-burner gas cooktop, built-in refrigerator, microwave drawer, and dishwasher. The kitchen flows into a spacious family room and breakfast area. The main level also includes a formal dining room, private study, and mudroom off the 3-car garage. Upstairs, the primary suite  includes a full bath with soaking tub, walk-in shower, dual vanities, and a large walk-in closet. Three additional bedrooms all include walk-in closets; one features a private en-suite bath, while the other two share a hall bath. Second-floor laundry adds convenience. Offering over 4,100 square feet on a 2-acre lot, this home delivers a rare new construction opportunity in a sought-after Centreville location.

Welcome to 3107 N Monroe Street in Wilmington — a property with tremendous potential and an excellent opportunity for buyers who want to build equity, create their own design, and transform a home to match their personal vision. Located in a well-established, highly desirable Wilmington neighborhood, this home offers strong bones, a generous lot, and the flexibility to reconfigure the layout to suit a wide range of needs. The owner began interior remodeling, opening several areas and removing walls to explore new layout possibilities. While the home was initially designed as a 3-bedroom property with a possible 4th bedroom in the attic, the interior has been opened up to create a more spacious feel. The current configuration does not limit future owners — the structure allows for restoration to its traditional layout or for the continuation of the open-concept direction the seller started. The seller is motivated and is offering the property empty and clean before settlement, giving buyers a clear and unobstructed canvas to complete renovations without the challenge of moving belongings or working around personal items. The second floor previously featured three bedrooms plus an attic room that could serve as a fourth. Today, the space is open and flexible, ready for someone to rebuild as they see fit. Whether you envision restoring multiple private bedrooms, creating a large primary suite, or designing a hybrid layout, the upstairs footprint gives you options that are increasingly rare in this part of Wilmington. On the main level, the traditional living and dining areas provide ample natural light and a solid foundation for redesign. These rooms allow you to create a modern, open kitchen-living-dining flow or preserve the charm of defined spaces. The basement adds even more value, with plenty of room for storage, tools, a workshop, or future finishing. With the right updates, it could be transformed into additional living space, recreation space, or a functional multi-purpose area. One of the most impressive highlights of this property is the oversized yard. The backyard is significantly larger than what is typically found in the city, offering room for outdoor entertaining, gardening, play areas, pets, or future extensions and additions. Spacious outdoor lots in Wilmington are becoming harder to find, making this feature a significant benefit for long-term homeowners and investors alike. 3107 N Monroe Street is ideal for anyone seeking a renovation project, investment opportunity, or a home that they can finish exactly to their taste. The structure, location, lot size, and flexibility create a rare combination. With some TLC and thoughtful improvements, this home has the potential to become a standout property in the neighborhood. The seller is motivated, and the home will be delivered empty and clean, ensuring a smooth transition for buyers and a welcoming start to your renovation plans. This is your chance to take a property with great bones and transform it into a personalized, long-term investment in one of Wilmington’s desirable communities.

At the end of the hall is a screened in porch that is completely private and overlooks the side yard and woods. Up the stairs you will enjoy a charming full living space with open features, cathedral ceiling, timber beams, pine hardwoods throughout, full kitchen, woodstove, 1 bedroom and 1 full bath. The last of the structures is a 2022 Dewson built Mid-Atlantic timber frame Monitor barn, also built with Hardiboard. This space has a large garage door as well as main door entry, timber frame, a shop towards the back, a half bath powder room and an old-style open elevator to the loft. There is also an antique iron staircase for access to the loft which can be used in a number of different ways. Under the barn there is covered parking for vehicles and a utility room.  The sale of this property includes tax parcels 07-013.00-044 and 07-013.00-038.

This home is the perfect blend of luxury, practicality, and custom craftsmanship—an ideal sanctuary for modern living. Whether you're entertaining, working from home, or simply relaxing, every inch of this home has been designed with lifestyle in mind.

Wait there's more!!  Recent HVAC (2 zone) a large Amish built workshop shed , a carriage house/pool house with full bathroom.  Ornate gardens and landscaping, a koi pond, brick walkways encased with privacy fencing , yet walking distance to schools, stores , dining and entertainment.  A Must see to imagine.  Book your private tour as soon as possible.

PublicRemarks: This architecturally significant Georgian Colonial residence seamlessly blends historical elegance with modern luxury. Situated on a generous and private 1.7-acre lot in one of Delaware’s most sought-after neighborhoods, this custom-built 6-bedroom, 6 full and 3 half-bath brick estate offers roughly 13,000 square feet of impeccably finished living space and built by the current owner's. Crafted in 2001 with a reverence for classical design, the home features exquisite historical elements throughout, including intricate plaster crown moldings and custom chair rails, wide-plank Santos Mahogany hardwood floors throughout, and a stately central staircase gracing the formal entry foyer. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated to honor traditional craftsmanship while delivering the utmost in contemporary comfort. The grand foyer is flanked by distinguished formal living and dining rooms, each with its own fireplace—wood-burning and gas, respectively. The dining room connects to a well-appointed butler’s pantry, leading into a chef’s kitchen designed for both beauty and function. Highlights include Knudsen custom cabinetry, antique panel glass details, a hand-made burled walnut island with seating, and premium appliances—including dual dishwashers. Adjacent to the kitchen is a private office/study with a wood gas-burning fireplace and a discreet staircase leading to a spacious HVAC controlled media room located above the three-car garage. The expansive family room offers built-in shelving, a wood-burning fireplace, and direct access to the rear slate patio—perfect for entertaining or quiet enjoyment. Additional main-level features include formal and informal powder rooms, a large laundry room, and convenient interior access to the garage. Ascend the elegant main staircase to the luxurious primary suite, which boasts a generous bedroom, spa-like en-suite bath with jetted soaking tub, walk-in shower, cultured marble double vanity, and custom-designed California Closets. The second level also offers an additional en-suite bedroom and two more bedrooms connected by a Jack-and-Jill bath. The third floor features two additional bedroom suites, a comfortable sitting room area, and a large storage room—ideal for needed overflow storage. The finished lower level is designed for entertaining on a grand scale. PublicRemarks: Candyland – A Once-in-a-Generation Equestrian Estate in Middletown, Delaware Welcome to Candyland, a landmark estate unlike anything the Middletown, Delaware market has seen in over 30 years. This extraordinary 120 plus acre equestrian property is more than a farm,it is a private world of luxury, privacy, and possibility. Encompassing three separate parcels, Candyland features five residences and two in-ground pools, offering a rare blend of multigenerational living, income potential, or private retreat opportunities all within one breathtaking estate. From the moment you enter, Candyland feels like a place suspended between imagination and reality. Rolling pastures stretch across the landscape, morning mist rises over open fields, and the quiet rhythm of horses sets the tone for each day. This is a property where life slows down, space expands, and every view feels intentional. At the heart of the estate stands the main residence,a thoughtfully designed showcase of modern luxury and timeless elegance. The home features an open-concept layout designed for both grand entertaining and everyday comfort. A dramatic foyer welcomes you in, setting the tone with refined finishes and curated design elements, while the gourmet kitchen serves as the centerpiece of the home with high-end appliances, generous workspace, and seamless flow into the main living areas. Beyond the primary residence, Candyland unfolds across its additional homes, each offering its own character and charm. Whether used for guests, extended family, caretakers, or rental opportunities, the flexibility of five total residences across three parcels creates a level of versatility rarely found in luxury equestrian estates. For the equestrian enthusiast, Candyland is fully equipped and thoughtfully designed for horse care and training at the highest level. Multiple barns provide premium shelter and functionality, complemented by run-in sheds throughout the property. Automatic water systems support ease of care, while expansive open land and dedicated spaces allow for riding, training, and enjoying the sport in its purest form. This is a property built for both performance and peace—where horses thrive as much as their owners. Life at Candyland extends far beyond its structures. Ride for miles across scenic acreage, host unforgettable gatherings under open skies, or simply enjoy the serenity of a private estate that feels worlds away while still being conveniently located in Middletown. Every corner of the property has been designed,intentionally or naturally—to inspire connection, relaxation, and a sense of escape. Rarely does a property of this scale, versatility, and beauty become available in such a desirable location. Candyland is not just a home or a farm, it is a legacy estate designed for those who value space, freedom, and extraordinary living. Candyland consists of three parcels totaling over 120 acres, five homes, and two in-ground pools. Public water hook-up is available. The square footage referenced reflects the main residence only. For safety and privacy, the property is shown by appointment only. Please do not enter Candyland Lane without a scheduled showing.

PublicRemarks: Searching for your own piece of heaven here on earth? Do you crave privacy and being surrounded by the beauty of nature? Are you interested in a home to make your own? 9 Walnut Ridge Rd. is an exceptional 2.23-acre parcel situated on the 9th hole of Fieldstone Golf Club in Greenville, Delaware now available to a buyer looking for peace and solitude without sacrificing location. The home was built in 1958 with thoughtful additions and renovations completed over the years. The original floorplan and renovations were made for a  bachelor pad lifestyle, although the improvement allows for more than enough space to accommodate a growing family. It has been nearly a decade since the property was last occupied leaving room to truly personalize this home. Enter a foyer with wood floors and a staircase leading up and down. Step into the formal living room (19'11” x 44'7”) which has wood floors, a large built-in wall aquarium, and magnificent picture windows overlooking the pasture and golf course. The formal dining room (15' x 14') is just off the original kitchen and offers plenty of space to host gatherings and entertain guests. The open floorplan allows flexibility with the eat-in kitchen (12'3” x 11'1”) which includes a stone backsplash wall, an island with seating, tile floors, a Viking range, and skylights that provide incredible natural light, open to the formal living room with a sliding door to a deck with views of the pool and yard. Off the kitchen is another room for entertainment that includes a walkout slider to another deck on the East side of the house. The primary bedroom (24’0” x 16’10”) completes the first floor with a full master bath and walk-in closet. On the second floor, the second bedroom (12’4” x 22'1”) with a private second-floor bathroom. Includes an attached 2-car garage and ample parking spaces in the driveway. There is a pool on the property that is ripe for an upgrade. The roof was installed only a couple of years ago. The large yard is home to many deer, foxes, squirrels, and other great wildlife. This home is a prime property for someone in search of a custom look who has the means to give it what it needs and deserves! Feel free to reach out for any further details on the property!
